goal: All 4 realm tilesets score 7.0+ on quality rubric. Kitchen and Upstairs scenes score 7.5+.

backlog.title: Cytoplasm biome floor tile — hue-shifted ramp variant
acceptance: Shadow pixel shifts toward blue-purple vs base color
backlog.designNotes: Current floor is decent. Needs hue-shifted shadow variant. Base: #050d10, Shadow: #030a15 (slightly more blue), Alt: #060e14

backlog.title: Cytoplasm biome wall tile — protein channel detail
acceptance: Left edge 1 shade lighter than right
Accent color accent used sparingly (1-2px per tile)
backlog.designNotes: Current wall has glowing crack. Replace with protein channel: 4x4 dark circle with 2 teal dots at cardinal points. More Undertale-appropriate than random cracks.

backlog.title: Cytoplasm mitochondria tile — upgrade to 40+ fillRect
backlog.designNotes: Current mitochondria is too boxy. Real mitochondria: elongated oval, inner membrane folds (cristae) zigzag pattern. Use 8-12 more fillRect calls for inner detail.

backlog.title: Genome Forest floor — root system pattern
acceptance: Root system lines visible (thin darker lines branching)

backlog.title: Genome Forest wall — bark texture with moss
Genome Forest DNA helix tree — animated rotation
acceptance: Animation: helix appears to rotate each frame
backlog.designNotes: Use animFrame to offset the zigzag lX/rX arrays — simulates rotation without complex math

backlog.title: Neural Nebula void floor — deep star field
acceptance: Stars twinkle at different phase offsets (not in sync)

backlog.title: Neural Nebula crystal spire — multi-faceted with glow
Protein Cathedral stone floor — cross grout pattern
Protein Cathedral gothic pillar — ornate carved detail
acceptance: Amber gold accent on highlight edge

backlog.title: Kitchen scene — full dark Undertale redesign
acceptance: All furniture dark with subtle highlights
backlog.completionNote: Implemented in IntroEngine.tsx drawKitchen(). Scores approximately 7.5/10.

backlog.title: Upstairs hallway scene — three doors with colored glow
acceptance: 3 distinct doors with subtle colored glow seeping under
backlog.completionNote: Implemented in IntroEngine.tsx drawUpstairs(). Scores approximately 7.0/10.

backlog.title: Bedroom scene dark redesign
backlog.completionNote: Implemented. Good foundation, could use more desk detail.

backlog.title: Mom's room scene dark redesign
backlog.acceptanceNote: Implemented. Warm dark tones. Consider adding more personal items.

backlog.title: Boss gate tile — gothic archway with cracked red glow
backlog.completionNote: Implemented with pulsing red glow and warning exclamation.

backlog.title: Path tiles — animated motor protein for Realm 1
backlog.completionNote: Microtubule highway with animated motor protein implemented.
